texto: A man wakes up and for a few moments he experiences everything exactly as it is. Jon wrote: A man wakes up and is lucid. It doesn’t last long, though, he thought, that kind of lucidity. If it did you wouldn’t be able to stand it, it would kill you.
explicacao: Citação de Ullmann sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “A man wakes up and for a few moments he experiences everything exactly as it is. Jon wrote: A man…” articula sabedoria, clarity, knowledge em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como knowledge.
